scaled_oracle_cases.description: Test parse_exchange_file with extended data variants including comment lines, empty lines, missing compartment, and malformed records to cover D-axis input complexity and C-axis contract constraints.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The solution must handle scaled input/data variants (comments, empty lines, missing fields, malformed records) and satisfy output-contract constraints (skip malformed lines, use default compartment).
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Support comment lines, empty lines, malformed records, and missing compartment fields; preserve ordering and yield only valid entries.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
tsv_path = 'exchange_limits.tsv'
with open(tsv_path, 'w') as f:
    f.write('compound\tlower\tupper\n')
    f.write('# This is a comment\n')
    f.write('Glucose\t-10\t100\n')
    f.write('   # another comment with leading spaces\n')
    f.write('Lactate\t0\t50\n')
    f.write('Malformed_line_only_two\n')
    f.write('# comment at end\n')

yaml_path = 'exchange_limits.yaml'
with open(yaml_path, 'w') as f:
    f.write('# Comment line\n')
    f.write('Glucose:-10:100:cytosol\n')
    f.write('# Another comment\n')
    f.write('O2:-1000:1000:mitochondria\n')
    f.write('# Missing compartment line (should use default)\n')
    f.write('Water:0:1000\n')
    f.write('Malformed:only:two:parts:extra\n')

empty_path = 'empty.tsv'
with open(empty_path, 'w') as f:
    pass
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the new input/data complexity introduced by this operator.
Scaled executable cases must expose the new computation and contract constraints introduced by this operator.
